name: 退款政策页面布局
description: PokerArena 主题退款政策页面布局

config.content.title: Refund Policy
config.content.body: This Refund Policy explains the conditions under which refunds may be requested and processed. Please read it carefully before making a purchase or deposit.
config.toc.items:
Overview|This Refund Policy explains the conditions under which refunds may be requested and processed.
Eligibility for Refunds|Refunds may be considered for duplicate transactions, technical errors, or as required by applicable law. Refunds are not available for used services.
How to Request a Refund|Contact our support team with your account details, transaction reference, and reason for the request. We will review your case and respond within the timeframes required by law.
Processing Time|Approved refunds are typically processed within 5–10 business days.
Contact|For questions or to submit a refund request, please use our Contact Us page or the support email provided on the platform.

notes: 退款政策页面布局，继承首页头尾
